Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Litigation Costs
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS JOSE CASTENEDA, JAIME ANDRADE, FERNANDO GUERRERO, SOTERO CANDELARIA'S MOTION FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND LITIGATION COSTS.
Appearances: Miles E. Locker of Locker Folberg LLP (962.1626) for plaintiffs and moving parties; Clark H. Cameron of Humphrey Berger & Associates LLP (818.871.0111) for defendant National American Insurance Company; Christopher Ahearn (no card provided) for defendants Nari Ramchandani and Nari Construction Co, Inc.
Argued and the court took the matter under submission. Further, plaintiff to take necessary steps to either withdraw, or seal the reply. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
----------------------------------------------
After hearing, the court ruled as follows: attorneys fees granted in the amount of $90,000.00 and costs granted in the amount of $1,288.71. Plaintiff's order signed. Mr. Locker and Mr. Cameron advised of the court's ruling by telephone.
